draft.subject: What's actually happening in digital collectibles right now
draft.preheader: A short briefing for someone who reads before they buy.
draft.body_html:
Hi {{ first_name | default: 'there' }} — welcome.

You came in through the kind of door people open when they're researching, not impulse-buying. So a briefing instead of a pitch:

  • The sector is consolidating, not expanding. Sorare reduced headcount by 35% last November. Panini lost the NBA license to Fanatics. Mindshare for licensed digital basketball is concentrating onto fewer platforms.
  • Top Shot's position is structural, not promotional. Exclusive NBA + NBPA digital licensing, Flow-native settlement, on-chain serials queryable in real time. None of those facts changed during the contraction.
  • Playoffs are the live test of the market. Conference Semifinals are minting Moments for Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Jayson Tatum, and Nikola Jokić — all of whom carry documented secondary price histories. Those are the comps you can actually price against.
  • Your free first Moment is the cheapest way to inspect the mechanic. Real serial number. Listable on the secondary market on arrival. No grading, no shipping, no 6-week wait.

You don't need to take our word on any of this. The data is on the marketplace and on-chain — go look.

Claim the free Moment and inspect it →

— The NBA Top Shot team

Versus the prior 7 days, the tape is {{set_t7_direction_pct}}. Your serials, against that tape. {{moment_1_player}} #{{moment_1_serial}} of {{moment_1_circulation}} lands in the {{moment_1_percentile}} of recent sales by serial range, with a comp band of ${{moment_1_comp_low}}–${{moment_1_comp_high}}. {{moment_2_player}} #{{moment_2_serial}}/{{moment_2_circulation}} sits at {{moment_2_percentile}}, comp band ${{moment_2_comp_low}}–${{moment_2_comp_high}}.

What the marketplace won't show you. Per-Moment listings and last sales — those are already in front of you. The set-level shape, the serial percentile, the driver — those aren't. We'd rather give you the synthesized read than have you build it from five tabs of secondary research.

The set page has every transaction behind these numbers. If a comp band looks thin, it is — circulation is low and recent sales are few, and we're not smoothing that for you.
